description: Headline graphic built on a photograph of the Frances Perkins (DOL) building exterior. The photograph shows the concrete building under a blue partly-cloudy sky with a large U.S. flag on a pole, and a large vertical banner hung on the building facade with a stylized portrait of Donald Trump, eyes downcast, and the text 'AMERICA 250', 'AMERICAN WORKERS', and 'FIRST' in large letters. A faint Department of Labor eagle seal watermark and 'DOL.GOV' appear at the lower right. A blue tab reads 'Labor News' in italic, above a bold white serif headline: 'Trump Administration proposes rule to expand access to fertility benefits with new legal pathway for employers to offer benefits directly to employees.'
notable_text: Labor News; Trump Administration proposes rule to expand access to fertility benefits with new legal pathway for employers to offer benefits directly to employees; AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST; AMERICA 250; DOL.GOV
